description: You are a marketing analyst. Using the file sales_data.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, build a channel analysis report in Power BI Desktop. The report must include a calculated column named Revenue_Band categorizing Sales_Amount as "Low" (< 100), "Medium" (>= 100 and < 500), or "High" (>= 500). Include two DAX measures: Avg_Sale (average of Sales_Amount) and Order_Count (count of rows). On a report page named "Channel Analysis", create a Line and Clustered Column Chart showing Order_Count (Column Values) and Avg_Sale (Line Values) by Sales_Channel (Shared Axis), and a Treemap showing Sales_Amount by Payment_Method. Save the final report as Channel_Analysis.pbix to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\.
